description: Letter from Yaʿqūb b. Binyām (=Yaʿaqov b. Binyamin) to his mother. In Judaeo-Arabic. Complete. The letter concerns practical matters as well as excuses for why he had not visited his mother on the holidays. (Information from Goitein’s index card)
description_he: מכתב מיעקוב בן בנים אל אמו; ביהודית-ערבית; עוסק בעניינים מעשיים ובאי-ביקורו בחג
